definition: ClinicalTrials.gov structured results efficacy/outcome file from Du and Shi Figshare collection
description: Source CSV used to identify interventional trial records and trial metadata
derivation_or_transformation: Downloaded externally and placed under data/raw/csv/
notes: Public third-party data source; not tracked in git

definition: ClinicalTrials.gov structured results adverse-event file from Du and Shi Figshare collection
description: Source CSV used to identify adverse-event terms by trial arm
derivation_or_transformation: Downloaded externally and placed under data/raw/csv/
notes: Public third-party data source; not tracked in git

definition: ClinicalTrials.gov trial identifier
description: Primary trial key used to merge efficacy and safety records
derivation_or_transformation: Trimmed with ustrtrim and converted away from strL before merging
validation_rules: must be unique within trial-level outputs

definition: ClinicalTrials.gov study type
description: Used to retain interventional trials from efficacy records
derivation_or_transformation: Rows are dropped when study_type does not contain Interventional
validation_rules: must contain Interventional for retained efficacy rows
notes: Exact source coding should be verified against Figshare schema

definition: Year the trial completed or was expected to complete
description: Used for trial summaries and outputs
notes: Definition of completed versus unfinished follows source field

definition: Trial enrollment count from the efficacy source file
derivation_or_transformation: Destringed with force and carried to trial-level output
notes: Source may represent enrollment rather than analyzed participants

definition: Trial condition text/list
description: Used for exploratory tabulations and exported outputs
derivation_or_transformation: Retained after dropping unused outcome columns
notes: Often list-like text from source extraction

definition: Condition MeSH terms
description: Retained for arm-level and trial-level exports
notes: Exact source formatting should be checked against Figshare schema

definition: Clinical trial phase
description: Retained in arm-level and trial-level outputs
notes: May include non-drug or not-applicable values

definition: ClinicalTrials.gov funder classification
description: Used in exported outputs and exploratory summaries

definition: Lead sponsor or funder name
Trial allocation design
Trial age eligibility field
notes: Source field may encode eligibility category

definition: Trial country field
Trial group labels or group count field
notes: Exact meaning should be verified against source schema

definition: Intervention text/list
Intervention MeSH terms
notes: Exact source formatting should be checked against Figshare schema

definition: ClinicalTrials.gov intervention type
Source field summarizing all interventions
notes: Exact meaning inferred from variable name

definition: Trial arm label from adverse-event records
description: Used to define trial_arm_id and exported arm-level summaries
derivation_or_transformation: Concatenated with nct_id to form trial_arm_id
notes: Arm labels may not be unique across trials without nct_id

definition: Adverse-event term before renaming to ae_name
description: Source text describing the adverse event
notes: Source term used for text flagging

definition: Adverse-event category before renaming to ae_category
description: Source adverse-event category or system classification
notes: Used in respiratory depression flag rule

definition: Lowercase adverse-event term
description: Used for definite and possible hypercapnia-related text matching
notes: Search terms are embedded in ClinicalTrialsGov.do

definition: Lowercase adverse-event category
description: Used for category-aware respiratory depression text matching
notes: Only one rule currently uses category and name jointly

definition: Number of events for an adverse-event term in a trial arm
source_or_origin: Used in event totals for definite and possible terms
validation_rules: Confirm whether source counts are events or affected participants before reuse

definition: Number of participants affected by an adverse-event term in a trial arm
validation_rules: Definition inferred from source variable name

definition: Number of participants at risk in a trial arm
source_or_origin: Maximum value within trial_arm_id becomes n_in_arm

definition: Composite trial-arm key
description: Unique key formed from nct_id and arm_title
validation_rules: must be present for arm aggregation
notes: May be unstable if arm_title changes in source data

definition: Within-arm adverse-event row counter
description: Used to keep first records and reshape adverse-event rows
notes: Regenerated after filtering to hypercapnia-related adverse events

definition: Indicator for adverse-event terms interpreted as definite hypercapnia/hypoventilation/respiratory depression
source_or_origin: Generated from ae_name text patterns including capni hypercarb hypovent respiratory acidosis respiratory depression type 2 respiratory failure and non-sleep apnea terms
validation_rules: Term list is code-defined and should be reviewed before scientific reuse

definition: Indicator for less-specific adverse-event terms that may represent ventilatory failure
source_or_origin: Generated from ae_name patterns including acute respiratory failure respiratory arrest ventilator dependence and chronic respiratory failure variants
validation_rules: Includes legacy typo acute repiratory failure and respitory failure to catch source spellings

definition: Events assigned only to rows with hypovent_ae == 1
Events assigned only to rows with pos_hypovent_ae == 1
Whether any definite hypercapnia-related AE appears in a trial arm
Whether any possible hypercapnia-related AE appears in a trial arm
validation_rules: Legacy code spelling omits the t in hypovent; preserve unless refactoring all downstream references

definition: Total definite hypercapnia-related events within a trial arm
Total possible hypercapnia-related events within a trial arm
validation_rules: Legacy spelling omits the t in hypovent

definition: Maximum at-risk count within a trial arm
Sum of arm denominators across first AE row for each arm within a trial
validation_rules: Definition depends on source arm reporting completeness

definition: Whether any definite hypercapnia-related AE appears in any arm of a trial
validation_rules: Used in trial-level outputs and poster results

definition: Whether any possible hypercapnia-related AE appears in any arm of a trial
validation_rules: Legacy code spelling omits the t in hypovent

definition: Total definite hypercapnia-related events across arms in a trial
Total possible hypercapnia-related events across arms in a trial
validation_rules: Legacy code spelling omits the t in hypovent

definition: Merge result category after combining safety and efficacy records
description: Used to distinguish adverse-event-only efficacy-only and matched trials
value_labels: 1 = Adverse Event Only | 2 = Efficacy Only | 3 = Both
derivation_or_transformation: Renamed from _merge_trials after merge m:1 nct_id
notes: Rows with value 2 are dropped before AE-focused exports

definition: Derived Stata dataset containing one retained trial-level efficacy row per nct_id
derivation_or_transformation: Written to outputs/stata/derived/trials_data.dta after local run
notes: Legacy root-level file was removed from git tracking

definition: Derived Stata dataset with merged adverse-event and trial metadata before hypercapnia filtering
derivation_or_transformation: Written to outputs/stata/derived/ae_by_arm_data.dta after local run

definition: Derived Stata dataset for arms with definite or possible hypercapnia-related adverse events
derivation_or_transformation: Written to outputs/stata/derived/by_arm_data.dta after local run
notes: Exported companion Excel file is outputs/stata/exports/by arm data.xlsx

definition: Derived Stata dataset with trial-level definite and possible hypercapnia-related indicators and counts
derivation_or_transformation: Written to outputs/stata/derived/by_trial_data.dta after local run
notes: Exported companion Excel file is outputs/stata/exports/by trial data.xlsx
